name: Holiday Music
description: Carols, jingles, crooners — the soundtrack of Christmas from Bing to Mariah.

questions.q: Which Bing Crosby Christmas single is the best-selling song of all time, with over 50M copies sold?
Who wrote 'White Christmas'?
In what year was 'Silent Night' first performed (in Oberndorf, Austria)?
Which 1857 song was originally written for Thanksgiving but is now a Christmas standard?
choices: We Wish You a Merry Christmas

source.notes: Written by James Lord Pierpont as 'The One Horse Open Sleigh.'

questions.q: Which 1949 Gene Autry song is about a reindeer with a glowing nose?

source.notes: Originally a Robert L. May story (1939); set to music by Johnny Marks.

questions.q: Whose 1994 hit 'All I Want for Christmas Is You' became a perennial #1 starting in 2019?

source.notes: First reached Hot 100 #1 in December 2019, 25 years after release.

questions.q: Which 1958 Brenda Lee song was recorded when she was just 13?

source.notes: Reached Hot 100 #1 in December 2023, 65 years after release.

questions.q: Which Wham! Christmas song was kept off the UK #1 in 1984 by Band Aid's 'Do They Know It's Christmas?'
choices: Wake Me Up Before You Go-Go

source.notes: Reached UK #1 in 2021 — 36 years after release.

questions.q: Who co-wrote and organized Band Aid's 1984 'Do They Know It's Christmas?' for famine relief?
Which 1970 holiday song by The Jackson 5 was Michael's vocal debut as a Christmas crooner?
choices: I Saw Mommy Kissing Santa Claus
Santa Claus Is Coming to Town

questions.q: What is the Latin title for the carol known in English as 'O Come, All Ye Faithful'?
Which classic carol begins 'Hark! the herald angels sing'?
choices: Angels We Have Heard on High

source.notes: Words by Charles Wesley (1739), music adapted from Mendelssohn (1855).

questions.q: Which 1944 standard from 'Meet Me in St. Louis' was sung by Judy Garland?
choices: Have Yourself a Merry Little Christmas

source.notes: Written by Hugh Martin and Ralph Blane.

questions.q: Which 1960 song features Bing Crosby and David Bowie as a famous TV duet from 1977?
choices: Little Drummer Boy / Peace on Earth

source.notes: Recorded for Crosby's 1977 Christmas TV special, just weeks before he died.

questions.q: Which best-selling Christmas album of all time was released in 1957?
Which 1965 Vince Guaraldi Trio jazz album is the most recognizable Christmas instrumental music?

source.notes: Recorded for the 1965 Peanuts TV special.

questions.q: Which 1979 Paul McCartney song became a holiday staple?

source.notes: Featured on McCartney's 1979 'Back to the Egg' era.

questions.q: Which 1973 Wizzard Christmas hit famously begins with kids singing 'When the snowman brings the snow…'?
choices: I Wish It Could Be Christmas Everyday

source.notes: Written by Roy Wood. UK #4 in 1973, perennial classic.

questions.q: Which 1987 Pogues + Kirsty MacColl Christmas song is voted best UK Christmas song repeatedly?

source.notes: Has reached UK Top 5 every year since streaming was counted.

questions.q: Which 1957 Bobby Helms classic is one of the most-played Christmas songs ever?

source.notes: audit-corrected 2026-05-09: year fixed from 1958 to 1957 — recorded Oct 29, 1957; reached US Top 40 in 1957, 1958, and 1960-1962 reissues.
